---
title: "Emmanuel Towner"
format: html
---

## 🖥️ Projects
- **[Pneumonia Classification](projects/pneumonia/pneumonia.ipynb)**  
  A machine learning project that used multiple models to classify pneumonia in chest X-rays.

<!-- - **[Banking Application](projects/bank/bank_app.qmd)**  
  A full-stack web application simulating bank functions, built with Java SpringBoot and React. -->

- **[MiddHousing](projects/middhousing/middhousing.qmd)**  
  A web app for Middlebury students to find and review dorm rooms, featuring a campus map and user reviews.

---
## 📬 Let's Connect

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/emmanuel-t-12b558211/)
